items.title: MAPPA-style anime action still (Jujutsu-Kaisen aesthetic)
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 1: MAPPA-style anime action still (Jujutsu-Kaisen aesthetic)
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
一幅採用MAPPA公司製作的《咒術回戰》（2020年電視動畫）視覺風格的動畫動作定格畫面。橫向16:9比例。

一位銀白髮的年輕男子，穿着深海軍藍色校服夾克，眼戴藍色眼罩，處於戰鬥中期姿勢——一隻手掌向外伸展，釋放出一個旋轉的濃密藍色能量球，球的邊緣有雷電般的閃光。對面是由液態黑色物質組成的惡魔陰影生物，擁有多個眼睛，從右側猛撲過來。

背景：黃昏時的破敗城市街道，碎裂的柏油路面，裂開的霓虹漢字招牌“呪術”以斷裂的紅色LED燈顯示，被毀壞的車輛，瓦礫被衝擊波懸浮在半空中，雨點在空中捕捉停留。

藝術指導：MAPPA風格的數字二維動畫——重厚的卡通陰影，清晰的線條藝術，兩人物體帶有邊緣光，能量球周圍帶有運動模糊光線。色彩方案採用深海軍藍、電青色、猩紅色點綴。動感衝擊構圖，延續《咒術回戰》澀谷篇的傳統。

prompts.text:
一幅少年動漫戰鬥關鍵視覺圖，採用Pierrot工作室製作的《火影忍者疾風傳》視覺風格。橫向16:9比例。

兩個忍者人物在空中激烈碰撞，正處於他們標誌招式交匯的瞬間——左側戰士右手掌發出發光的藍色螺旋查克拉，右側戰士右手掌握有噼啪作響的白色閃電刀刃。碰撞點發出圓形衝擊波。

兩名戰士均佩戴護額，穿着上忍風格的戰術背心及卷軸口袋，腳穿忍者草鞋。左側：金色刺蝟髮型，臉頰有鬍鬚狀標記，表情專注咧嘴，藍色眼睛。右側：黑髮，一隻紅色寫輪眼似的三勾玉眼睛，表情冷靜。

背景：夜晚的山谷，破裂的土地，倒塌中的巨大神樹，月光下的雲朵漸散，櫻花花瓣被衝擊波捲起。

藝術指導：Pierrot工作室火影忍者疾風傳風格——動態透視，衝突中心放射強烈速度線，動漫動作關鍵幀品質，數字二維卡通陰影，色彩飽和但不發光，明顯原畫品質線條，戲劇性背光。

prompts.text:
一幅黑白少年漫畫雙頁版面（橫向16:9作爲單一畫面，帶有微弱的中央分割線）。高對比墨線與網點，週刊少年Jump籃球漫畫傳統（井上雄彥《灌籃高手》/ 藤巻忠俊《黑子的籃球》）。

構圖：5個不規則格子加一個跨越兩頁右下方的大斜格子，呈現高潮扣籃場面。

- 左上角：主角銳利眼神特寫，汗珠滴落，綁緊頭帶
- 中上方：滿座的高中體育館寬景，記分牌顯示"42 — 40 · 第4節 0:03"
- 右上角：對手隊長震驚表情，嘴張開
- 左中部：主角雙手緊握籃球騰空而起
- 右中部小格子：厚重黑字片假名音效"バッ"
- 右下大斜格（跨兩頁一半）：主角扣籃，籃筐彎曲，巨大的墨跡書法漢字"決"（決定）填滿負空間

藝術指導：專業漫畫家品質——自信的墨線，戲劇化的網點漸變，扣籃發散的速度線，多樣線寬，淺米色紙張紋理及輕微頁邊陰影。

對白氣泡故意留白，僅顯示兩個音效詞。

items.title: Manga relationship map — *A Tale of Two Cities*
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 4: Manga relationship map — *A Tale of Two Cities*
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
A manga-style illustration showing the person-relationship map for "A Tale of Two Cities" by Charles Dickens. Single full-frame composition, monochrome ink + screentone, classic shōjo / historical-manga aesthetic.

Characters as small portrait panels connected by labeled relationship lines:
- Charles Darnay ↔ Lucie Manette: "marriage"
- Sydney Carton → Lucie: "unrequited love → ultimate sacrifice"
- Lucie ↔ Dr. Manette: "father / daughter"
- Madame Defarge → Darnay family: "vengeance"
- Monsieur & Madame Defarge: "husband / wife, revolutionaries"
- Jarvis Lorry → Manette family: "loyal banker & guardian"
- Miss Pross → Lucie: "devoted protector"

Title "A TALE OF TWO CITIES" in elegant serif at top. Decorative border echoes 18th-century Paris (guillotine silhouette) / London (Tower of London). Monochrome black-ink linework with grey screentone shading.

prompts.text: Create a landscape anime ensemble key visual featuring six distinct adult young women, ages 22 to 27, with cute gentle personalities, gathered together in a cozy spring campus-cafe courtyard. The composition should feel like a polished slice-of-life anime promotional poster rather than a single portrait: one central seated character holding a sketchbook, two friends leaning in with warm smiles, one shy character holding a small bouquet, one cheerful character waving, and one calm bookish character pouring tea. Give each character a clearly different hairstyle, outfit palette, accessory, and expression while keeping the whole group harmonious and wholesome. Fashion: soft cardigans, pleated skirts, berets, ribbons, loafers, light stockings, pastel jackets, modest stylish outfits. Mood: sweet, well-behaved, playful, friendly, no fanservice, no nudity, no explicit pose, adult characters only. Use modern high-end anime rendering with crisp line art, luminous eyes, soft cel shading, warm afternoon light, cherry blossoms, cafe signage, small pastries, balanced depth, clean background details, and a strong readable group silhouette.

items.title: Tide Brothers 19-page manga proof sheet
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 10: Tide Brothers 19-page manga proof sheet
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text: Create one tall manga chapter proof sheet containing 19 numbered miniature pages for an original shonen pirate manga, not based on any existing series. Title: "TIDE BROTHERS: THE STARFALL MAP". Main characters: Rune, a cheerful rubbery-armed young pirate captain with a straw-colored scarf but original costume; and Ash, his older flame-wielding brother with a red coat, freckles, and a calm smile. They are original characters, not existing IP. Show 19 small pages arranged as a readable contact sheet, each page with 1 to 3 manga panels, black-and-white ink, screentone, dynamic speed lines, expressive faces, and clear speech bubbles. Complete plot beats: 1 cover page with the brothers on a stormy deck; 2 reunion at a floating harbor; 3 discovery of a star-shaped map; 4 alien sea-beast emerges; 5 Rune jokes "Adventure found us first!"; 6 Ash replies "Then we answer together."; 7 rival sky pirates attack; 8 slapstick cooking scene; 9 quiet flashback promise; 10 double-page-style action pose compressed into one page; 11 map glows with alien constellations; 12 crew cheers; 13 villain captain steals the compass; 14 chase across rooftop sails; 15 Ash shields Rune with fire; 16 Rune launches a spring-like punch; 17 brothers laugh after victory; 18 cliffhanger: moon door opens; 19 final page text "NEXT: THE ISLAND ABOVE THE CLOUDS". Keep dialogue short, legible, and complete. Style: classic weekly shonen manga energy, original pirate adventure, wholesome brotherhood, no gore, no existing copyrighted characters.

prompts.text:
一個6格電影分鏡，佈局爲3×2網格，整體橫向16:9。每個格子是一個矩形的鉛筆和馬克筆速寫，帶有白色邊距和下方的小信息條。

場景：一場穿越東京雨巷的追逐，最終在屋頂跳躍。

畫格1 — 寬景設定：潮溼的霓虹巷道，跑者從左側進入；牆上有漢字招牌。信息：“PANEL 1 · EXT. ALLEY · NIGHT · WIDE / 靜止 / 2秒”
畫格2 — 跟蹤鏡頭：從背後跑者邁步中；追趕者身影在10米後。信息：“PANEL 2 · OTS TRACKING / 跟隨攝像 / 左平移45° / 3秒”
畫格3 — 特寫：跑者的臉，汗水，眼睛快速看向消防梯。信息：“PANEL 3 · CU RUNNER / 靜止 / 1.5秒 / 音效：呼吸”
畫格4 — 低角度：跑者躍上消防梯；雨線。信息：“PANEL 4 · LOW ANGLE / 仰攝30° / 2秒”
畫格5 — 寬幅航拍：跑者剪影襯托霓虹天際線，準備跳躍屋頂。信息：“PANEL 5 · WIDE AERIAL / 起重機下移 / 4秒”
畫格6 — 匹配剪輯：跑者的靴子落在溼屋頂；水花飛濺。信息：“PANEL 6 · MATCH CUT CU / 靜止 / 1秒 / 音效：水花”

藝術指導：經典動畫學派分鏡——鉛筆線條，灰色馬克筆陰影，畫格2和5上有紅鉛筆箭頭註釋（攝像機移動和動作軌跡）。淺米色紙張紋理背景。

items.title: Chinese ink-wash mountain landscape

prompts.text: A traditional Chinese ink-wash (水墨) landscape painting of mist-shrouded mountains, rendered on aged xuan rice paper. Layered mountain ranges receding into distance through gradations of black ink — bold dark foreground peaks with sharp brushwork, mid-ground ranges in medium wash, far peaks almost dissolved into pale grey mist. A single traditional pavilion perched on a cliff midway up, a small solitary figure crossing a wooden bridge over a waterfall. Pine trees with calligraphic branches, curling cloud-mist flowing between peaks (留白 negative-space clouds). A vertical seal stamp in red (篆刻 zhu-wen style) bottom-left, a vertical column of calligraphic characters reading "山高水長" top-right in elegant caoshu (草書) brushwork. Paper has faint warm beige tone with visible fiber texture. Aesthetic in the tradition of 范寬 Fan Kuan / 馬遠 Ma Yuan Song-dynasty landscape painting — contemplative, restrained, deep negative space, brush-energy (气韵) visible in every stroke.

prompts.text:
請基於[主題]自動生成一張“博物館目錄風格中文拆解信息圖”。

整張圖需結合寫實主視覺、結構拆解、中國文字註釋、材質描述、圖案含義、顏色含義以及核心特徵總結。你需要根據[主題]自動判定最合適的主體、服飾體系、文物結構、時代風格、關鍵部件、材質工藝、色彩方案及佈局結構，用戶無需提供其他額外信息。

整體風格應爲：國家博物館展覽板塊、歷史服飾目錄及文化/博物館專題信息圖，而非普通海報、古風肖像、電商詳情頁或動漫插畫。背景採用米白、絹白、淺茶等紙張紋理，整體呈現高級、剋制、專業和收藏感。

佈局固定：
- 頂部：中文主標題 + 副標題 + 簡介
- 左側：結構拆解區域，配中文引線註釋關鍵部件，附細節特寫
- 右上：材質/工藝/質感區域，展示真實質感樣本及說明
- 右中：圖案/顏色/含義區域，展示主色調、紋樣樣本及文化說明
- 底部：穿着順序/組成流程圖 + 核心特徵總結

若主題適合人物呈現，則用真人全身立姿作爲中心主體；若更適合文物或單一結構，則改爲主體拆解示意圖，整體依然保持完整中文信息圖形式。所有文字須爲簡體中文，字跡清晰整潔，避免亂碼、錯別字、英文或拼音。

避免：海報感、攝影棚肖像感、電商感、動漫感、角色扮演感、亂註釋、結構錯誤、文字模糊、假質感、過度裝飾。

prompts.text:

應避免普通海報或簡單插畫的感覺，更應像一個模塊化教育信息圖，結合實地指南的清晰度、百科頁面的結構、生活方式知識卡的精緻感，以及強社交媒體解析圖的分享度。

圖片應包含：
- 主題的清晰吸引主視覺
- 多個放大細節標註
- 多個圓角模塊信息區
- 強烈的標題層級和重點標籤
- 簡潔卻信息豐富的教育內容
- 視覺評分、快速要點或Top 5模塊

內容區根據主題自動適配。可用類別包括：基本資料、分類、外觀、習性或生態、形成機制或結構、生長或使用條件、護理或維護建議、風險和注意事項、適用用戶或用例、優缺點、快速評分卡。

視覺要求：乾淨明亮背景、柔和色彩、細膩陰影、精緻圖標、圓角信息卡、整潔佈局。信息密度高但不擁擠，最終圖像應可發佈、收藏，並且可重複作爲知識卡格式而非廣告。

避免商業宣傳海報感。強調知識組織、模塊化信息和實地指南展示。

items.title: Weekend Seoul travel guide poster
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 70: Weekend Seoul travel guide poster

prompts.text: Generate a polished one-page Chinese travel guide poster for a fast weekend trip from Nanjing to Seoul in May. Use LARGE highly legible Chinese text, short phrases only, and no paragraph blocks. Focus on shopping, skincare, and a stylish Seongsu-dong route. Layout: big title, 4 modules only (行程 / 区域推荐 / 购物清单 / 美妆护肤), each with 2 to 4 short bullet points, plus a small cute route map with icons. Clean editorial infographic style, soft pastel colors, neat spacing, high readability, modern Xiaohongshu travel card aesthetic. Avoid tiny text, avoid dense explanations, avoid garbled characters.

items.title: Patient cohort and multimodal biomarker workflow
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 75: Patient cohort and multimodal biomarker workflow
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
Create a Nature Medicine / Science Translational Medicine style research paper figure, landscape 3:2 (1536×1024), soft literature-science palette, minimal and elegant.

Figure title: "Patient cohort and multimodal biomarker workflow".

Layout: a clean 4-panel academic figure labeled A–D with small bold panel letters.
A. CONSORT-style patient cohort flow diagram: "Screened n=1,248" → "Eligible n=612" → branch into "Training cohort n=428" and "External validation n=184". Include exclusion side boxes: "missing imaging n=81", "insufficient follow-up n=43", "quality-control fail n=32".
B. Multimodal sample-processing flow: icons for "CT imaging", "blood proteomics", "EHR timeline", "outcome labels" flowing into a pale-blue fusion box "feature harmonization".
C. Small Kaplan–Meier survival plot with two clean curves labeled "low-risk" and "high-risk", muted teal vs soft rose, x-axis "Months", y-axis "Event-free survival".
D. Compact table-style performance summary with three rows: "AUROC", "C-index", "Calibration slope" and two columns "Internal" / "External".

Style requirements: white background, light gray axes, thin lines, ample margins, muted teal, dusty blue, soft coral, pale sand, no neon, no dark background, Nature journal figure aesthetics, readable labels, precise arrows, subtle gridlines, no decorative clutter, no fake logos, no watermark.

items.title: Single-cell immune atlas reveals treatment-response states
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 76: Single-cell immune atlas reveals treatment-response states
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
Create a polished Nature / Cell style biomedical research figure, landscape 3:2 (1536×1024), soft minimal palette, publication-ready.

Figure title: "Single-cell immune atlas reveals treatment-response states".

Layout: 4-panel figure labeled A–D.
A. Large UMAP scatter plot with 8 softly colored immune clusters; labels: "CD8 T", "CD4 T", "B cells", "NK", "Mono", "DC", "Treg", "Plasma". Use pastel teal, sage, lavender, peach, slate, amber.
B. Dot plot of marker genes with rows "GZMB", "IFNG", "CXCL13", "MS4A1", "LYZ", "FOXP3" and columns matching immune clusters; dot size = fraction, color = expression.
C. Small stacked bar chart comparing "Responder" vs "Non-responder" cell-state proportions, with 5 muted segments and a tidy legend.
D. Pseudotime trajectory diagram: a clean branching curve from "naive" to "effector" and "exhausted", with small arrows and gradient color.

Style requirements: literature-science design, white background, thin gray axes, compact legends, readable micro-labels, restrained typography, soft colors, elegant spacing, no 3D, no glossy UI, no fake journal logo, no watermark.

items.title: Multimodal medical-AI method figure
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 77: Multimodal medical-AI method figure
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
Create a Nature Biomedical Engineering / NeurIPS medical-AI method figure, landscape 3:2 (1536×1024), soft literature-science colors and minimal academic layout.

Figure title: "Multimodal foundation model for clinical decision support".

Layout: a left-to-right method pipeline with three horizontal bands and panel labels A–C.
A. Inputs on the left: small clean icons and labeled cards "Radiology image", "Pathology tile", "EHR sequence", "Lab values", "Genomics". Use subtle rounded rectangles.
B. Middle architecture: five modality encoders feeding into a central pale-teal block "Shared clinical representation"; include small modules "contrastive alignment", "missing-modality mask", "temporal attention". Add thin arrows and skip connections.
C. Outputs on the right: three task heads "diagnosis", "risk score", "treatment response" with small calibrated probability bars. Add a lower inset "external validation" showing two hospital icons and an arrow labeled "site transfer".

Style requirements: soft Nature/Science palette (muted teal, dusty blue, sage green, warm sand, coral accents), white background, precise vector-like arrows, modest shadows only, readable labels, lots of whitespace, no futuristic HUD, no clinical gore, no real hospital logos, no watermark.

items.title: Therapeutic response bar and forest plot
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 78: Therapeutic response bar and forest plot
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
Create a Nature Medicine style statistical results figure, landscape 3:2 (1536×1024), soft, restrained, publication-quality.

Figure title: "Therapeutic response across molecular subgroups".

Layout: 4-panel figure labeled A–D.
A. Grouped bar chart: response rate (%) for four subgroups "A", "B", "C", "D" across two treatments "standard" and "adaptive". Use muted navy and soft teal bars, thin error bars, numeric labels.
B. Forest plot of hazard ratios for subgroups with a vertical reference line at HR=1.0; rows "age <65", "age ≥65", "high inflammation", "low inflammation", "mutation-positive", "mutation-negative". Use small squares and confidence intervals.
C. Volcano-style biomarker association plot with pale gray background points and highlighted labeled markers "IL6", "CXCL10", "TP53", "MKI67".
D. Minimal mechanism schematic: adaptive therapy reduces inflammatory signaling and restores immune surveillance; use three clean nodes connected by arrows, no complex biology drawings.

Style requirements: literature-science aesthetic, white background, soft desaturated colors, thin gray axes, clear legends, compact labels, generous margins, Nature-style figure polish, no fake values that look too random, no decorative background, no watermark.

items.title: Transformer encoder–decoder architecture
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 79: Transformer encoder–decoder architecture
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
橫向 16:9 學術概念圖，展示 Transformer 編碼器-解碼器架構，NeurIPS 定稿風格。左右兩列垂直堆疊，中間用虛線分隔。

左列標題："ENCODER (×N)"。模塊從下到上依次爲："Input tokens" → "Input Embedding" → "+ Positional Encoding" → 虛線框 "Encoder layer"，包含 "Multi-Head Self-Attention"、"Add & Norm"、"Feed-Forward"、"Add & Norm"，每個子層周圍有細彎曲的殘差箭頭。

右列標題："DECODER (×N)"。模塊從下到上依次爲："Output tokens (shifted right)" → "Output Embedding" → "+ Positional Encoding" → 虛線框 "Decoder layer"，包含 "Masked Multi-Head Self-Attention"、"Add & Norm"、"Multi-Head Cross-Attention"（有箭頭從編碼器頂部標註 "keys, values" 指向此處）、"Add & Norm"、"Feed-Forward"、"Add & Norm"。解碼器上方有 "Linear"、"Softmax"、"Output probabilities"。

標題："Transformer: encoder–decoder with multi-head attention"。副標題："Vaswani et al., 2017"。

items.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 80: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
Landscape 16:9 academic systems diagram of a RAG pipeline, 6-stage left-to-right flow.

(1) "User query" box with placeholder text "What are the side effects of drug X?" and a small user silhouette.
(2) Hexagonal "Embedding encoder (BERT-style)", caption "dense vector d=768".
(3) Stylised database cylinder "Vector store" with "Index: 1.2M chunks"; arrow from (2) labeled "kNN, k=5".
(4) "Retrieved passages" — stack of 5 doc thumbnails; caption "top-k chunks + metadata".
(5) Hexagonal hub "Frozen LLM"; long curved arrow from (1) labeled "original query" also lands here; arrow from (4) labeled "retrieved context".
(6) "Grounded answer" with inline marker "[cite: doc#47]"; caption "with source citations".

Dashed outline around (2)-(3) labeled "OFFLINE — built once". Dashed outline around (4)-(5) labeled "ONLINE — per query".

Title: "Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline". Subtitle: "Lewis et al., 2020".

items.title: Multi-agent LLM system architecture
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 81: Multi-agent LLM system architecture
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
橫向 16:9 高保真系統圖，描繪多智能體 LLM 架構，風格類似細緻的 AutoGen / LangGraph / Anthropic Managed Agents 圖 1。細微陰影，暖銅色高光，編號流程標記 ①②③④。

區域 1 — "User interface"：圓角用戶框，內含佔位任務 "research question: summarize recent red-teaming attacks and reproduce the top three"。

區域 2 — "Orchestrator layer"：中心六邊形節點 "Planner LLM"，頂部邊緣暖銅色。三顆衛星芯片："Task decomposition"、"Agent routing"、"Re-plan on failure"。小嵌入芯片 "prompt cache hit ~98%"。

區域 3 — "Specialised workers"：2×2 六邊形，分別爲 "Researcher" / "Coder" / "Critic" / "Writer"，每個帶有符號和狀態條帶（"idle"、"running step 3/5"、"done"、"running step 2/4"）。中央標註 "async message bus"。

區域 4 — "Tools & memory"： (a) "Tool registry" 面板列出 "web_search ×41"、"python_exec ×27"、"read_file ×18"、"write_file ×12"、"browser_use ×7"；(b) "Memory" 面板含 "Short-term scratchpad" 和圓柱體 "Long-term vector store — 1.8M episodes"。

底部嵌入 "Example trace"：8步水平時間線，從 "User asks" 到 "Planner decomposes"、"Researcher: web_search(...)"、"Coder: python_exec(...)"、"Critic: verify"、"Re-plan"（循環箭頭）、"Writer: compose final answer"。

標題："Agentic LLM system: planner orchestrates specialised workers over a shared tool and memory layer"。副標題："adapted from AutoGen (Wu et al., 2023), LangGraph, and Anthropic Managed Agents patterns"。

items.title: Denoising diffusion forward/reverse chain
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 82: Denoising diffusion forward/reverse chain
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
橫向 16:9 學術圖示，展示擴散正向 + 逆向鏈，兩個水平鏈垂直堆疊。

頂部鏈（左→右）標註 "Forward diffusion q(x_t | x_{t-1})"：五幅畫面 "x_0"、"x_{T/4}"、"x_{T/2}"、"x_{3T/4}"、"x_T"，畫面從清晰的小山與太陽景象逐漸變爲純高斯噪聲。畫面間箭頭標註 "+ β_t ε"。

底部鏈（右→左）標註 "Reverse denoising p_θ(x_{t-1} | x_t)"：同樣五幅畫面逆序排列，每對之間有一個小六邊形塊 ε_θ(x_t, t)。

最右側彎曲箭頭 "T diffusion steps" 連接頂部右側和底部右側；最左側彎曲箭頭 "sample x_0" 連接底部左側和頂部左側。

標題："Denoising Diffusion: forward corruption and learned reverse"。副標題："Ho et al., 2020"。

items.title: Empirical scaling laws plot
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 83: Empirical scaling laws plot
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
橫向 16:9 對數刻度訓練損失與計算量關係圖，四條不同模型規模的曲線。

X 軸 "Training compute (FLOPs)" 以對數刻度標註 "1e20"、"1e21"、"1e22"、"1e23"、"1e24"。Y 軸 "Validation loss (cross-entropy)" 線性遞減刻度 "3.5"、"3.0"、"2.5"、"2.0"、"1.5"。

四條下降曲線，帶 ±1σ 陰影帶，尾部附近標註：
"70M params"（石板灰）、"1B params"（柔和海軍藍）、"10B params"（塵土綠松石）、"70B params"（柔和陶土色）。

暖銅色虛線對角線，標註 "compute-optimal frontier"；在等計算量交叉點處有空心圓。右上角圖例框。

標題："Empirical scaling laws: loss vs training compute"。副標題："四種模型規模使用固定數據混合；陰影帶表示三次實驗的 ±1 標準差。"

items.title: Benchmark comparison heatmap
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 84: Benchmark comparison heatmap
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
橫向 16:9 模型 × 基準熱度矩陣。

列（旋轉 45°）："MMLU"、"HumanEval"、"GSM8K"、"MATH"、"BBH"、"ARC-C"、"HellaSwag"、"TruthfulQA"。
行（右對齊無襯線字體）："GPT-4o"、"Claude 4.7 Opus"、"Gemini 3 Pro"、"Llama 4 405B"、"Qwen3-Next"、"DeepSeek-V3.1"、"Mistral-3 Large"、"Yi-3 34B"、"Phi-4 14B"、"OLMo-2 7B"。

每個格子填充塵土綠松石漸變，顏色深淺反映分數；格子內顯示數值（如"72.3"、"88.1"）。每列最佳分數用 1.5px 柔和陶土色描邊。

右側垂直色條，標註刻度 "0"、"25"、"50"、"75"、"100" 和標籤 "accuracy (%)"。

標題："Benchmark comparison across 10 frontier LLMs"。副標題："零次準確率；每個基準的最佳分數以加粗描邊標出。評測時間：2026年3月。"

items.title: Ablation bar chart with error bars
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 85: Ablation bar chart with error bars
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
橫向 16:9 分組柱狀消融圖。

X 軸：5 個基準組 "MMLU"、"GSM8K"、"HumanEval"、"BBH"、"MATH"。Y 軸 "Accuracy (%)"，刻度 "0"、"20"、"40"、"60"、"80"、"100"。

每組包含 4 根並排柱子：
(1) "full model" — 塵土綠松石，頂部有細暖銅色邊框
(2) "– chain-of-thought" — 石板灰
(3) "– self-consistency" — 柔和海軍藍
(4) "– tool-use" — 柔和陶土色

每個柱子頂部有細黑色 ±1σ 誤差條；上方爲等寬字體數字標籤。淡淡的水平網格線。右上角圖例框。

標題："Ablation of core reasoning components across 5 benchmarks"。副標題："誤差條表示三次運行的 ±1 標準差；每根柱子頂部顯示相對完整模型的數值下降"。

items.title: LLM pretraining data-mixture sankey
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 86: LLM pretraining data-mixture sankey
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
橫向 16:9 桑基圖，展示預訓練數據混合，三階段帶透明色帶。

左側（8 個源塊，高度按標記數比例）："Common Crawl (web) 540B"（柔和海軍藍，最大）、"arXiv papers 180B"（塵土綠松石）、"GitHub code 160B"（石板灰）、"Wikipedia 40B"（柔和陶土色）、"StackExchange QA 30B"（暖銅色）、"Books (public domain) 25B"（淺橄欖色）、"Patents 18B"（淺海軍藍）、"Curated news & forums 15B"（塵土綠松石）。

中間（3 個處理塊，堆疊）："Deduplicated (MinHash + exact)"、"Quality-filtered (classifier + heuristics)"、"PII-scrubbed (regex + NER)"。

右側（3 個最終拆分）："Pretraining set 1.4T tokens"（最大）、"Instruction-tune pool 12B tokens"、"RLHF preference pool 3B tokens"。

流動色帶繼承源顏色，中間標籤顯示令牌數（"85B"、"320B"、"44B"）。底部帶圖例條。

標題："LLM pretraining data mixture and downstream splits"。副標題："去重及質量過濾後的標記數；色帶厚度 ∝ 標記流量"。

items.title: Multi-head attention heatmaps
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 87: Multi-head attention heatmaps
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
橫向 16:9 圖示，4 個注意力熱圖（2×2 網格），共享 12 標記輸入。

X 軸和 Y 軸的標記標籤（X 軸旋轉 45°）：“The”、“quick”、“brown”、“fox”、“jumped”、“over”、“the”、“lazy”、“dog”、“near”、“the”、“river”。

四個 12×12 單元格面板，各自標題：
“Layer 6, Head 3 — subject-verb”（突出顯示“fox” / “jumped”之間的單元格）
“Layer 9, Head 7 — coreference”（突出顯示“the”(×2) / “river”之間的單元格）
“Layer 11, Head 2 — prepositional”（突出顯示“over” / “dog”, “near” / “river”之間的單元格）
“Layer 14, Head 1 — sentence-final”（活動集中在最右側列）

單元格顏色：塵土綠松石漸變，顏色越深表示權重越高。峯值單元格用 1px 柔和陶土色描邊。最右側有共享的垂直色條，標註刻度“0.0”、“0.25”、“0.5”、“0.75”、“1.0”，標籤“attention weight”。

標題：“Representative multi-head attention patterns in a 16-layer Transformer”。副標題：“4 個頭中的示例，精心挑選以展示不同頭部功能；靈感來自 Clark et al., 2019。”

items.title: Frontier LLM family tree (2018–2026)
items.source_title: Full catalog No. 88: Frontier LLM family tree (2018–2026)
items.author: wuyoscar/gpt_image_2_skill

prompts.text:
橫向 16:9 時間線 / 家族樹，展示 2018–2026 年前沿 LLM，三條豎直堆疊的車道，橫向時間軸。

prompts.text:
橫向 16:9 圖示，ReAct 軌跡，針對事實問答任務，豎直排列 7 個交替塊。

1. Thought: "I need to identify the scientist associated with the proof of the Higgs boson and then look up their Nobel Prize year."

3. Observation: "The 2012 announcement at CERN confirmed the Higgs boson..."
4. Thought: "The theoretical prediction is due to Peter Higgs and François Englert. I should check if they were later awarded the Nobel."
5. Action: wiki_search("Peter Higgs Nobel Prize")
6. Observation: "Peter Higgs and François Englert won the 2013 Nobel Prize in Physics..."
7. Thought: "Answer: 2013."

Thought 塊：左側塵土綠松石邊框，斜體，帶大腦符號。Action 塊：左側柔和海軍藍邊框，等寬字體，帶扳手符號。Observation 塊：左側柔和陶土色邊框，較淺填充，帶眼睛符號。塊間有細石板灰箭頭。

底部：膠囊形狀，“Final answer: 2013”，帶勾符號。
